{{CargoRelic
|name=Royal Celtic Harp
|available=1
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=12-14
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (0.76%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.06%)
|description=On Dec 14, 1071 AD, the Royal Celtic Harp appeared in Ireland for the first time. Royal Celtic Harp is a large polyphonic stringed instrument. It can be played solo or as a part of an ensemble. According to legend, King David once ordered a harp made out of pure gold. When played solo, it exhibits a soft lyrical cadenza.<br>[Classic Works]<br>Concerto for Flute and Harp by Mozart. Harp Concerto by Greer and Hindemith. Waltz of Flowers by Tchaikovsky.
|fame=55
|art=76
|fth=109
|civ=67
|tech=55
|ss1=In explorations, Cells collected +%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss2=In explorations, Cells collected +%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss3=In explorations, Cells collected +%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss4=In explorations, Cells collected +%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss5=In explorations, Cells collected +%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss6=In explorations, Cells collected +7.2%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +120<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +12<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300
|ss7=In explorations, Cells collected +7.2%<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail HP +120<br>Per 5 Mirage Gems gained, Snail ATK +12<br>Mirage Gems Gained: 300/300<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, Zombie Cells gained +30%
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, Demon Cells gained +30%
|skill3=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, Angel Cells gained +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Exploration Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Mirage Gem Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond W-Tad Output Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Stan Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Wish Coin]]
